pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh IMAGE_PATH and verifier.py FileName checks.
Derived mathematically (11.28 meters / 2820 pixels = 0.004) from blueprint_setup.txt and verified real-world P-51D wingspan.
Matches the tolerance bound logic applied in verifier.py.
Matches export_result.sh output path and verifier.py read path.

privileged_info_summary: The target filename is confirmed as p51_top_view.jpg, which is synthetically generated because the real-world Wikimedia URL is a broken 404 link. The expected scale factor of 0.004 is mathematically correct, calculated by dividing the real-world P-51D wingspan (11.28 meters) by the image width specified in the setup text (2820 pixels). The scale tolerance is bounded at 0.0001 as implemented in the verifier. The evaluation output correctly targets /tmp/openvsp_blueprint_alignment_result.json.
